`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-hover",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";\r
\r
export function useHover<T extends HTMLElement | null>(elements?: Array<T | null>, { touch = false, open, setOpen }: { touch?: boolean; open?: boolean; setOpen?: (v: boolean) => void } = {}) {\r
  const [opened, setOpened] = useState(false);\r
  const [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice] = useState(false);\r
  const hovered = open !== undefined ? open : opened;\r
  const setHovered = setOpen !== undefined ? setOpen : setOpened;\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const onMouseEnter = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!isTouchDevice) setHovered(true);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setHovered]);\r
\r
  const onMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (!isTouchDevice) setHovered(false);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setHovered]);\r
\r
  const onMouseMove = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(false);\r
  }, [isTouchDevice]);\r
\r
  const onTouchStart = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (touch) {\r
      setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
      setHovered(true);\r
    }\r
  }, [setHovered, touch]);\r
\r
  const onTouchEnd = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (touch) setHovered(false);\r
  }, [setHovered, touch]);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const handleTouchStart = () => {\r
      setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
    };\r
\r
    const handleMouseMove = () => {\r
      setIsTouchDevice(false);\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("touchstart", handleTouchStart);\r
    window.addEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("touchstart", handleTouchStart);\r
      window.removeEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const current = ref.current;\r
\r
    const attachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.addEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
        el.addEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
        el.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
        if (touch) {\r
          el.addEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
          el.addEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    const detachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
        if (touch) {\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    if (elements) {\r
      elements.forEach(el => {\r
        attachListeners(el);\r
      });\r
    }\r
    if (current) {\r
      attachListeners(current);\r
    }\r
    return () => {\r
      if (elements) {\r
        elements.forEach(el => {\r
          detachListeners(el);\r
        });\r
      }\r
      if (current) {\r
        detachListeners(current);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [elements, onMouseEnter, onMouseLeave, onMouseMove, onTouchStart, onTouchEnd, touch]);\r
\r
  return { ref, hovered, setHovered };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-hover.ts"})]})}function h(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function d(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return E(x);})();

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-id",code:`"use client";\r
import React, { useState } from "react";\r
import { useIsomorphicEffect } from "./use-isomorphic-effect";\r
\r
const __useId: () => string | undefined = (React as any)["useId".toString()] || (() => undefined);\r
\r
export function useReactId() {\r
  const id = __useId();\r
  return id ? \`\${id.replace(/:/g, "")}\` : "";\r
}\r
\r
function randomId() {\r
  return \`\${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 11)}\`;\r
}\r
\r
export function useId(staticId?: string) {\r
  const reactId = useReactId();\r
  const [uuid, setUuid] = useState(reactId);\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    setUuid(randomId());\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  if (typeof staticId === "string") {\r
    return staticId;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (typeof window === "undefined") {\r
    return reactId;\r
  }\r
\r
  return uuid;\r
}\r
\r
function generateHierarchyId<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(el: T) {\r
  let id = "";\r
  let total = 0;\r
  let currentElement: HTMLElement | null = el;\r
  const indices: number[] = [];\r
\r
  while (currentElement) {\r
    const parentElement: HTMLElement | null = currentElement.parentElement;\r
    if (parentElement) {\r
      const children: HTMLElement[] = Array.from(parentElement.children) as HTMLElement[];\r
      const index = children.indexOf(currentElement);\r
\r
      total += index;\r
      indices.unshift(index);\r
\r
      id = \`\${index}-\${id}\`;\r
    }\r
    currentElement = parentElement;\r
  }\r
\r
  const hierarchyId = indices.join("-");\r
  return \`\${total}-\${hierarchyId}\`;\r
}\r
\r
export function useHierarchyId<T extends HTMLElement = any>(el: T | null) {\r
  const [id, setId] = useState<string>("");\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    if (el) {\r
      const id = generateHierarchyId(el);\r
      setId(id);\r
    }\r
  }, [el]);\r
\r
  return id;\r
}\r
\r
export const generatedyId = (element: HTMLElement | null): string => {\r
  if (!element) return "";\r
  const path = [];\r
  let current: HTMLElement | null = element;\r
\r
  while (current && current.parentElement) {\r
    const childrenArray = Array.from(current.parentElement.children);\r
    const index = childrenArray.indexOf(current);\r
    path.unshift(index + 1);\r
    current = current.parentElement;\r
  }\r
\r
  return path.join("-");\r

import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useIntersection<T extends HTMLElement = any>(options?: ConstructorParameters<typeof IntersectionObserver>[1]) {\r
  const [entry, setEntry] = useState<IntersectionObserverEntry | null>(null);\r
\r
  const observer = useRef<IntersectionObserver | null>(null);\r
\r
  const ref = useCallback(\r
    (element: T | null) => {\r
      if (observer.current) {\r
        observer.current.disconnect();\r
        observer.current = null;\r
      }\r
\r
      if (element === null) {\r
        setEntry(null);\r
        return;\r
      }\r
\r
      observer.current = new IntersectionObserver(([_entry]) => {\r
        setEntry(_entry);\r
      }, options);\r
\r
      observer.current.observe(element);\r
    },\r
    [options]\r
  );\r
\r
  return { ref, entry };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-intersection.ts"})]})}function d(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(u,{...r})}):u(r)}function k(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return g(_);})();

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useInterval(fn: () => void, interval: number) {\r
  const [active, setActive] = useState(false);\r
  const intervalRef = useRef<number | undefined>(undefined);\r
  const fnRef = useRef<() => void>(() => {});\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    fnRef.current = fn;\r
  }, [fn]);\r
\r
  const start = () => {\r
    setActive(old => {\r
      if (!old && !intervalRef.current) {\r
        intervalRef.current = window.setInterval(fnRef.current!, interval);\r
      }\r
      return true;\r
    });\r
  };\r
\r
  const stop = () => {\r
    setActive(false);\r
    window.clearInterval(intervalRef.current);\r
    intervalRef.current = undefined;\r
  };\r
\r
  const toggle = () => {\r
    if (active) {\r
      stop();\r
    } else {\r
      start();\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  return { start, stop, toggle, active };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-interval.ts"})]})}function d(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function y(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return R(b);})();

import { useState } from "react";\r
\r
export interface UseListStateHandlers<T> {\r
  setState: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T[]>>;\r
  append: (...items: T[]) => void;\r
  prepend: (...items: T[]) => void;\r
  insert: (index: number, ...items: T[]) => void;\r
  pop: () => void;\r
  shift: () => void;\r
  apply: (fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => void;\r
  applyWhere: (condition: (item: T, index: number) => boolean, fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => void;\r
  remove: (...indices: number[]) => void;\r
  reorder: ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) => void;\r
  swap: ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) => void;\r
  setItem: (index: number, item: T) => void;\r
  setItemProp: <K extends keyof T, U extends T[K]>(index: number, prop: K, value: U) => void;\r
  filter: (fn: (item: T, i: number) => boolean) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export type UseListState<T> = [T[], UseListStateHandlers<T>];\r
\r
export function useListState<T>(initialValue: T[] = []): UseListState<T> {\r
  const [state, setState] = useState(initialValue);\r
\r
  const append = (...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...current, ...items]);\r
  const prepend = (...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...items, ...current]);\r
\r
  const insert = (index: number, ...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...current.slice(0, index), ...items, ...current.slice(index)]);\r
\r
  const apply = (fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => setState(current => current.map((item, index) => fn(item, index)));\r
\r
  const remove = (...indices: number[]) => setState(current => current.filter((_, index) => !indices.includes(index)));\r
\r
  const pop = () =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned.pop();\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const shift = () =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned.shift();\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const reorder = ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      const item = current[from];\r
\r
      cloned.splice(from, 1);\r
      cloned.splice(to, 0, item);\r
\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const swap = ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      const fromItem = cloned[from];\r
      const toItem = cloned[to];\r
\r
      cloned.splice(to, 1, fromItem);\r
      cloned.splice(from, 1, toItem);\r
\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const setItem = (index: number, item: T) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned[index] = item;\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const setItemProp = <K extends keyof T, U extends T[K]>(index: number, prop: K, value: U) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned[index] = { ...cloned[index], [prop]: value };\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r

    setState(current => current.filter(fn));\r

      insert,\r
      pop,\r
      shift,\r
      apply,\r
      applyWhere,\r
      remove,\r
      reorder,\r
      swap,\r
      setItem,\r
      setItemProp,\r
      filter\r
    }\r
  ];\r

import { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "./use-window-event";\r
\r
export type StorageType = "localStorage" | "sessionStorage";\r
\r
export interface StorageProperties<T> {\r
  key: string;\r
  initialValue?: T;\r
  getInitialValueInEffect?: boolean;\r
  serialize?(value: T): string;\r
  deserialize?(value: string | undefined): T;\r
}\r
\r
function serializeJSON<T>(value: T, hookName: string) {\r
  try {\r
    return JSON.stringify(value);\r
  } catch (error: any) {\r
    throw new Error(\`\${hookName}: Failed to serialize the value\`, error);\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function deserializeJSON(value: string | undefined) {\r
  try {\r
    return value && JSON.parse(value);\r
  } catch {\r
    return value;\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function createStorageHandler(type: StorageType) {\r
  const getItem = (key: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      return window[type].getItem(key);\r
    } catch (error) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to get value from storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
      return null;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const setItem = (key: string, value: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      window[type].setItem(key, value);\r
    } catch (error: any) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to set value to storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const removeItem = (key: string) => {\r
    try {\r
      window[type].removeItem(key);\r
    } catch (error: any) {\r
      console.warn("use-local-storage: Failed to remove value from storage, localStorage is blocked", error);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  return { getItem, setItem, removeItem };\r
}\r
\r
export function createStorage<T>(type: StorageType, hookName: string) {\r
  const eventName = type === "localStorage" ? "oeri-local-storage" : "oeri-session-storage";\r
  const { getItem, setItem, removeItem } = createStorageHandler(type);\r
\r
  return function useStorage({ key, initialValue = undefined, getInitialValueInEffect = true, deserialize = deserializeJSON, serialize = (value: T) => serializeJSON(value, hookName) }: StorageProperties<T>) {\r
    const readStorageValue = useCallback(\r
      (skipStorage?: boolean): T => {\r
        let storageBlockedOrSkipped;\r

        try {\r
          storageBlockedOrSkipped = typeof window === "undefined" || !(type in window) || window[type] === null || !!skipStorage;\r
        } catch (_e) {\r
          storageBlockedOrSkipped = true;\r
        }\r

        if (storageBlockedOrSkipped) {\r
          return initialValue as T;\r
        }\r
\r
        const storageValue = getItem(key);\r
        return storageValue !== null ? deserialize(storageValue) : (initialValue as T);\r

    );\r

    const setStorageValue = useCallback(\r

            const result = val(current);\r

              })\r

            return result;\r
          });\r

          setItem(key, serialize(val));\r
          window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(eventName, { detail: { key, value: val } }));\r
          setValue(val);\r
        }\r
      },\r
      [key]\r
    );\r

document.title: useMeasureScrollbar
document.description: Measures the scrollbar size (width/height), useful for layout adjustments in scrollable containers.
document.summary: Measures scrollbar dimensions for adaptive layout handling.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `useMeasureScrollbar` works.

<UseMeasureScrollbarDemosUsage />

## API

| API       | Type    | Default           | Annotation                                        |
| --------- | ------- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| render`?` | boolean | `false`           | state action isOpen value                         |
| has`?`    | boolean | `{ has: true }`   | set attributes `data-has-scroll` for some element |
| modal`?`  | boolean | `{ modal: true }` | remove scroll bar when `isOpen = true`            |

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"use-measure-scrollbar",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
\r
interface Options {\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
export function useMeasureScrollbar(render: boolean = false, options: Options = {}): [boolean, number] {\r
  const { modal = true } = options;\r
\r
  const [hasScrollbar, setHasScrollbar] = useState<boolean>(true);\r
  const [scrollbarWidth, setScrollbarWidth] = useState<number>(0);\r

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";\r
\r
export interface UseMediaQueryOptions {\r
  getInitialValueInEffect: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
type MediaQueryCallback = (event: { matches: boolean; media: string }) => void;\r
\r
function attachMediaListener(query: MediaQueryList, callback: MediaQueryCallback) {\r
  try {\r
    query.addEventListener("change", callback);\r
    return () => query.removeEventListener("change", callback);\r
  } catch (e) {\r
    console.log(e);\r
    query.addListener(callback);\r
    return () => query.removeListener(callback);\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function getInitialValue(query: string, initialValue?: boolean) {\r
  if (typeof initialValue === "boolean") {\r
    return initialValue;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (typeof window !== "undefined" && "matchMedia" in window) {\r
    return window.matchMedia(query).matches;\r
  }\r
\r
  return false;\r
}\r
\r
export function useMediaQuery(\r
  query: string,\r
  initialValue?: boolean,\r
  { getInitialValueInEffect }: UseMediaQueryOptions = {\r
    getInitialValueInEffect: true\r
  }\r
) {\r
  const [matches, setMatches] = useState(getInitialValueInEffect ? initialValue : getInitialValue(query, initialValue));\r
  const queryRef = useRef<MediaQueryList>(null);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if ("matchMedia" in window) {\r
      queryRef.current = window.matchMedia(query);\r
      setMatches(queryRef.current.matches);\r
      return attachMediaListener(queryRef.current, event => setMatches(event.matches));\r
    }\r
\r
    return undefined;\r
  }, [query]);\r
\r
  return matches;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-media-query.ts"})]})}function d(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(u,{...r})}):u(r)}function k(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(b);})();

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import type { MouseEvent } from "react";\r
\r
export function useMouse<T extends HTMLElement = any>(options: { resetOnExit?: boolean } = { resetOnExit: false }) {\r
  const [position, setPosition] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });\r
\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const setMousePosition = (event: MouseEvent<HTMLElement>) => {\r
    if (ref.current) {\r
      const rect = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();\r
\r
      const x = Math.max(0, Math.round(event.pageX - rect.left - (window.pageXOffset || window.scrollX)));\r
\r
      const y = Math.max(0, Math.round(event.pageY - rect.top - (window.pageYOffset || window.scrollY)));\r
\r
      setPosition({ x, y });\r
    } else {\r
      setPosition({ x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY });\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const resetMousePosition = () => setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const element = ref?.current ? ref.current : document;\r
    element.addEventListener("mousemove", setMousePosition as any);\r
    if (options.resetOnExit) element.addEventListener("mouseleave", resetMousePosition as any);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      element.removeEventListener("mousemove", setMousePosition as any);\r
      if (options.resetOnExit) element.removeEventListener("mouseleave", resetMousePosition as any);\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, options]);\r
\r
  return { ref, ...position };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-mouse.ts"})]})}function d(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,n.jsx)(u,{...t})}):u(t)}function E(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return y(k);})();

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-move",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function clamp(value: number, min: number | undefined, max: number | undefined) {\r
  if (min === undefined && max === undefined) return value;\r
  if (min !== undefined && max === undefined) return Math.max(value, min);\r
  if (min === undefined && max !== undefined) return Math.min(value, max);\r
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min!), max!);\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseMovePosition {\r
  x: number;\r
  y: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function clampUseMovePosition(position: UseMovePosition) {\r
  return {\r
    x: clamp(position.x, 0, 1),\r
    y: clamp(position.y, 0, 1)\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
interface useMoveHandlers {\r
  onScrubStart?: () => void;\r
  onScrubEnd?: () => void;\r
}\r
\r
export function useMove<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLDivElement>(onChange: (value: UseMovePosition) => void, handlers?: useMoveHandlers, dir: "ltr" | "rtl" = "ltr") {\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
  // const ref = useRef<T | null>(null);\r
  const mounted = useRef<boolean>(false);\r
  const isSliding = useRef(false);\r
  const frame = useRef(0);\r
  const [active, setActive] = useState(false);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    mounted.current = true;\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const onScrub = ({ x, y }: UseMovePosition) => {\r
      cancelAnimationFrame(frame.current);\r
\r
      frame.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {\r
        if (mounted.current && ref.current) {\r
          ref.current.style.userSelect = "none";\r
          const rect = ref.current.getBoundingClientRect();\r
\r
          if (rect.width && rect.height) {\r
            const _x = clamp((x - rect.left) / rect.width, 0, 1);\r
            onChange({\r
              x: dir === "ltr" ? _x : 1 - _x,\r
              y: clamp((y - rect.top) / rect.height, 0, 1)\r
            });\r
          }\r
        }\r
      });\r
    };\r
\r
    const bindEvents = () => {\r
      document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
      document.addEventListener("mouseup", stopScrubbing);\r
      document.addEventListener("touchmove", onTouchMove);\r
      document.addEventListener("touchend", stopScrubbing);\r
    };\r
\r
    const unbindEvents = () => {\r
      document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
      document.removeEventListener("mouseup", stopScrubbing);\r
      document.removeEventListener("touchmove", onTouchMove);\r
      document.removeEventListener("touchend", stopScrubbing);\r
    };\r
\r
    const startScrubbing = () => {\r
      if (!isSliding.current && mounted.current) {\r
        isSliding.current = true;\r
        if (typeof handlers?.onScrubStart === "function") {\r
          handlers.onScrubStart();\r
        }\r
        setActive(true);\r
        bindEvents();\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    const stopScrubbing = () => {\r
      if (isSliding.current && mounted.current) {\r
        isSliding.current = false;\r
        setActive(false);\r
        unbindEvents();\r
        setTimeout(() => {\r
          if (typeof handlers?.onScrubEnd === "function") {\r
            handlers.onScrubEnd();\r
          }\r
        }, 0);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    const onMouseDown = (event: MouseEvent) => {\r
      startScrubbing();\r
      event.preventDefault();\r
      onMouseMove(event);\r
    };\r
\r
    const onMouseMove = (event: MouseEvent) => onScrub({ x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY });\r
\r
    const onTouchStart = (event: TouchEvent) => {\r
      if (event.cancelable) {\r
        event.preventDefault();\r
      }\r
\r
      startScrubbing();\r
      onTouchMove(event);\r
    };\r
\r
    const onTouchMove = (event: TouchEvent) => {\r
      if (event.cancelable) {\r
        event.preventDefault();\r
      }\r
\r
      onScrub({\r
        x: event.changedTouches[0].clientX,\r
        y: event.changedTouches[0].clientY\r
      });\r
    };\r
\r
    ref.current?.addEventListener("mousedown", onMouseDown);\r
    ref.current?.addEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart, {\r
      passive: false\r
    });\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      if (ref.current) {\r
        ref.current.removeEventListener("mousedown", onMouseDown);\r
        ref.current.removeEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [dir, onChange, handlers]);\r
\r
  return { ref, active };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-move.ts"})]})}function m(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(l,{...n})}):l(n)}function d(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return S(E);})();

export function useMutationObserver<T extends HTMLElement = any>(callback: MutationCallback, options: MutationObserverInit, target?: HTMLElement | (() => HTMLElement) | null) {\r

import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
\r
interface NetworkStatus {\r
  downlink?: number;\r
  downlinkMax?: number;\r
  rtt?: number;\r
  saveData?: boolean;\r
  effectiveType?: "slow-2g" | "2g" | "3g" | "4g" | "5g";\r
  type?: "bluetooth" | "cellular" | "ethernet" | "wifi" | "wimax" | "none" | "other" | "unknown";\r
}\r
\r
function getOnlineStatus() {\r
  return typeof navigator !== "undefined" ? navigator.onLine : false;\r
}\r
\r
function getConnection(): NetworkStatus {\r
  if (typeof navigator === "undefined") return {};\r
\r
  const n = navigator as any;\r
  const connection = n.connection || n.mozConnection || n.webkitConnection;\r
\r
  if (!connection) return {};\r
\r
  return {\r
    downlink: navigator.onLine ? connection.downlink : 0,\r
    downlinkMax: navigator.onLine ? connection.downlinkMax : 0,\r
    effectiveType: navigator.onLine ? connection.effectiveType : "none",\r
    rtt: navigator.onLine ? connection.rtt : 0,\r
    saveData: navigator.onLine ? connection.saveData : false,\r
    type: navigator.onLine ? (typeof connection.type === "undefined" ? "unknown" : connection.type) : "none"\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export function useNetwork() {\r

    online: getOnlineStatus(),\r
    ...getConnection()\r
  });\r
\r

      online: getOnlineStatus(),\r
      ...getConnection()\r
    });\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    updateConnectionStatus();\r
  }, [updateConnectionStatus]);\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("online", updateConnectionStatus);\r
  useWindowEvent("offline", updateConnectionStatus);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const n = navigator as any;\r
    const connection = n.connection || n.mozConnection || n.webkitConnection;\r
\r
    if (connection) {\r
      connection.addEventListener("change", updateConnectionStatus);\r
      return () => connection.removeEventListener("change", updateConnectionStatus);\r
    }\r
  }, [updateConnectionStatus]);\r
\r
  return status;\r

document.title: useOpenState
document.description: Manages a toggleable state with optional external control via props.
document.summary: Controlled/uncontrolled open state management.

body.raw:
## Usage

The `useOpenState` hook provides an easy way to manage open/close state for components, modals, or dropdowns. It's perfect for handling visibility toggles or managing whether an element is expanded or collapsed. Below is a basic example that demonstrates how to use the `useOpenState` hook to manage the open/close state of a component.

<UseOpenStateDemosUsage />

### Create Tooltip

The `useOpenState` hook can be used for managing the visibility of UI elements like tooltips. This section demonstrates how to create a tooltip component that opens and closes based on state managed by the hook.

<UseOpenStateDemosUsageTooltip />

---

## Depend on

- [`useHotkeys`](/docs/web/hooks/use-hotkeys)
- [`useMeasureScrollbar`](/docs/web/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar)

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

<SourceCodes name="use-open-state" />

`,(0,n.jsx)(r,{name:"use-open-state",code:`"use client";\r
import { createPortal } from "react-dom";\r
import { useHotkeys } from "@/hooks/use-hotkeys";\r
import { useMeasureScrollbar } from "@/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar";\r
import { useCallback, useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import { useClickOutside } from "@/hooks/use-click-outside";\r
import { SizeElement, useElementRect } from "@/hooks/use-element-info";\r
\r
export enum Selector {\r
  Trigger = "trigger",\r
  Content = "content",\r
  Overlay = "overlay",\r
  Root = "root",\r
  Item = "item"\r
}\r
export enum DataAlign {\r
  start = "start",\r
  center = "center",\r
  end = "end"\r
}\r
export enum DataSide {\r
  top = "top",\r
  right = "right",\r
  bottom = "bottom",\r
  left = "left"\r
}\r
export enum DataState {\r
  open = "open",\r
  opened = "opened",\r
  closed = "closed"\r
}\r
export type RectInfo = "x" | "y" | "width" | "height" | "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left" | "scrollX" | "scrollY";\r
type Observes = "side" | "align" | "touch" | "offset" | "sideswipe" | "alignswipe" | "triggerRect" | "contentRect" | "measureSize";\r
export type MeasureSize = { h: number | "auto"; w: number | "auto" };\r
export type RectElement = Record<RectInfo, number>;\r
interface ObserveOptions {\r
  observe?: Partial<Record<Observes, boolean>>;\r
}\r
interface StateSharedOptions {\r
  align?: \`\${DataAlign}\`;\r
  side?: \`\${DataSide}\`;\r
  sideOffset?: number;\r
  alignOffset?: number;\r
  multipleOpen?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  onOpenChange?: (open: SetStateAction<boolean>) => void;\r
  delay?: { open?: number; closed?: number };\r
}\r
export interface HoverOpenOptions extends StateSharedOptions {}\r
export interface ClickOpenOptions extends StateSharedOptions {\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
  popstate?: boolean;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  clickOutsideToClose?: boolean;\r
  hotKeys?: "/" | "M" | "ctrl+J" | "ctrl+K" | "alt+mod+shift+X" | (string & {});\r
}\r
\r
export interface OpenStateOptions extends HoverOpenOptions, ClickOpenOptions, ObserveOptions {\r
  triggerRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>;\r
  contentRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;\r
}\r
\r
const DEFAULTEVENTS = ["mousedown", "touchstart"];\r
const BUFFER_OFFSET = 2;\r
\r
function nextValue<T>(currentValue: T, values: T[]): T {\r
  const currentIndex = values.indexOf(currentValue);\r
  const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % values.length;\r
  if (currentIndex === values.length - 1) return values[currentIndex];\r
  return values[nextIndex];\r
}\r
\r
export function setValues<T>(state: boolean | undefined | string | number, attr: T): T | Record<string, never> {\r
  return state ? (attr as T) : {};\r
}\r
\r
export function setVars(selector: \`\${Selector}\`, info?: RectElement): Record<string, string> | undefined {\r
  if (!info) return;\r
  const properties = ["height", "width", "x", "y", "right", "bottom"] as const;\r
  return properties.reduce(\r
    (acc, key) => {\r
      if (info[key] !== undefined) {\r
        acc[\`--\${selector}-\${key[0]}\`] = \`\${info[key]}px\`;\r
      }\r
      return acc;\r
    },\r
    {} as Record<string, string>\r
  );\r
}\r
\r
interface GetInsetProps {\r
  align: "start" | "center" | "end";\r
  side: "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left";\r
  sideOffset: number;\r
  alignOffset: number;\r
  triggerRect: RectElement;\r
  contentRect: RectElement;\r
}\r
\r
export function getInset(_props: GetInsetProps): readonly [number, number] {\r
  const { align, side, contentRect, sideOffset, alignOffset, triggerRect } = _props;\r
  let top: number = 0;\r
  let left: number = 0;\r
\r
  const calcAlign = (triggerStart: number, triggerSize: number, contentSize: number): number => {\r
    switch (align) {\r
      case "start":\r
        return triggerStart;\r
      case "center":\r
        return triggerStart + (triggerSize - contentSize) / 2;\r
      case "end":\r
        return triggerStart + triggerSize - contentSize;\r
      default:\r
        return triggerStart;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  switch (side) {\r
    case "top":\r
      top = triggerRect.top - contentRect.height - sideOffset;\r
      left = calcAlign(triggerRect.left + alignOffset, triggerRect.width, contentRect.width);\r
      break;\r
    case "right":\r
      top = calcAlign(triggerRect.top + alignOffset, triggerRect.height, contentRect.height);\r
      left = triggerRect.right + sideOffset;\r
      break;\r
    case "bottom":\r
      top = triggerRect.bottom + sideOffset;\r
      left = calcAlign(triggerRect.left + alignOffset, triggerRect.width, contentRect.width);\r
      break;\r
    case "left":\r
      top = calcAlign(triggerRect.top, triggerRect.height, contentRect.height);\r
      left = triggerRect.left + alignOffset - contentRect.width - sideOffset;\r
      break;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {\r
    const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;\r
    if (left < BUFFER_OFFSET) {\r
      if (side === "left") {\r
        left = triggerRect.right + sideOffset; // ltr\r
      } else {\r
        left = BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      }\r
    } else if (left + contentRect.width > viewportWidth - BUFFER_OFFSET) {\r
      if (side === "right") {\r
        left = triggerRect.left - contentRect.width - sideOffset; // rtl\r
      } else {\r
        left = viewportWidth - contentRect.width - BUFFER_OFFSET;\r
      }\r
    }\r
  }\r
\r
  return [top, left] as const;\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseVarsPositions extends GetInsetProps {\r
  contentSize: SizeElement | undefined;\r
}\r
export function getVarsPositions(required: UseVarsPositions) {\r
  const { triggerRect, contentRect, contentSize, ...others } = required;\r
  const [top, left] = getInset({ triggerRect, contentRect, ...others });\r
\r
  const vars = {\r
    triggerInset: {\r
      "--top": \`\${top + triggerRect.scrollY}px\`,\r
      "--left": \`\${left + triggerRect.scrollX}px\`\r
    },\r
    triggerSize: {\r
      "--measure-trigger-h": \`\${triggerRect.height}px\`,\r
      "--measure-trigger-w": \`\${triggerRect.width}px\`\r
    },\r
    contentSize: {\r
      "--measure-available-h": \`\${contentSize?.h}px\`,\r
      "--measure-available-w": \`\${contentSize?.w}px\`\r
    }\r
  };\r
  return { vars, top, left };\r
}\r
\r
export interface UseUpdatedPositions {\r
  triggerRect: RectElement;\r

const detectorsBrowser = [\r
  { regex: /msie|trident/i, name: "Internet Explorer", icon: Icons.WorldIcon },\r
  { regex: /edg/i, name: "Edge", icon: Icons.BrandEdgeIcon },\r
  { regex: /opr\\/|opera/i, name: "Opera", icon: Icons.BrandOperaIcon },\r
  { regex: /chrome|chromium|crios/i, name: "Chrome", icon: Icons.BrandChromeIcon },\r
  { regex: /firefox|fxios/i, name: "Firefox", icon: Icons.BrandFirefoxIcon }\r
];\r
const detectorsOS = [\r
  { regex: /iPad/i, name: "iPad", icon: Icons.DeviceTabletIcon },\r
  { regex: /(Macintosh|Mac OS|MacIntel|MacPPC|Mac68K)/i, name: "Mac OS", icon: Icons.BrandMacOsIcon },\r
  { regex: /(iOS|iPhone|iPod)/i, name: "iOS", icon: Icons.BrandAppleIcon },\r
  { regex: /Android/i, name: "Android", icon: Icons.BrandAndroidIcon },\r
  { regex: /Linux/i, name: "Linux", icon: Icons.BrandLinuxIcon }\r
];\r
const detectorsWindows = [\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 10.0/i, name: "Windows 10", icon: Icons.BrandWindows810Icon },\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 6.2/i, name: "Windows 8", icon: Icons.BrandWindows810Icon },\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 6.1/i, name: "Windows 7", icon: Icons.BrandWindowsLegacyIcon },\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 6.0/i, name: "Windows Vista", icon: Icons.BrandWindowsLegacyIcon },\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 5.1/i, name: "Windows XP", icon: Icons.BrandWindowsLegacyIcon },\r
  { regex: /Windows NT 5.0/i, name: "Windows 2000", icon: Icons.BrandWindowsClassicIcon },\r
  { regex: /(Win32|Win64|Windows|WinCE)/i, name: "Windows", icon: Icons.BrandWindowsClassicIcon }\r
];\r
const detectorsPhone = [\r
  { regex: /HUAWEI/i, match: /HUAWEI[^;]*/i, name: "Huawei", icon: Icons.BrandHuaweiIcon },\r
  { regex: /Xiaomi|Redmi/i, match: /(Xiaomi|Redmi)[^;]*/i, name: "Xiaomi", icon: Icons.BrandXiaomiIcon },\r
  { regex: /OnePlus/i, match: /OnePlus[^;]*/i, name: "OnePlus", icon: Icons.BrandAndroidIcon },\r
  { regex: /OPPO/i, match: /OPPO[^;]*/i, name: "OPPO", icon: Icons.BrandAndroidIcon },\r
  { regex: /Vivo/i, match: /Vivo[^;]*/i, name: "Vivo", icon: Icons.BrandAndroidIcon }\r
];\r
\r
export function getBrowser(userAgent: string): OSInfo | undefined {\r
  // Browsers\r
  for (const detector of detectorsBrowser) {\r
    if (detector.regex.test(userAgent)) return { name: detector.name, icon: detector.icon };\r
  }\r
  if (/safari/i.test(userAgent) && !/chrome|crios/i.test(userAgent)) return { name: "Safari", icon: Icons.BrandSafariIcon };\r
}\r
\r
export function getDevice(userAgent: string): OSInfo {\r
  if (/SM-|Samsung/i.test(userAgent)) {\r
    const model = userAgent.match(/SM-[A-Z0-9]+/)?.[0];\r
    return { name: model ? \`Samsung \${model}\` : "Samsung Device", icon: Icons.BrandSamsungIcon };\r
  }\r
  for (const detector of detectorsPhone) {\r
    if (detector.regex.test(userAgent)) {\r
      return { name: userAgent.match(detector.match)?.[0] || detector.name, icon: detector.icon };\r
    }\r
  }\r
  if (/iPhone/i.test(userAgent)) {\r
    const model = userAgent.match(/iPhone\\s([\\d,]+)/)?.[1]?.replace(",", ".");\r
    return { name: model ? \`iPhone \${model}\` : "iPhone", icon: Icons.BrandAppleIcon };\r
  }\r
  for (const detector of detectorsOS) {\r
    if (detector.regex.test(userAgent)) return { name: detector.name, icon: detector.icon };\r
  }\r
  if (/X11/.test(userAgent) && !/Win/.test(userAgent) && !/Mac/.test(userAgent)) return { name: "UNIX", icon: Icons.WorldIcon };\r
  // Windows Versions\r
  for (const detector of detectorsWindows) {\r
    if (detector.regex.test(userAgent)) return { name: detector.name, icon: detector.icon };\r
  }\r
\r
  return { name: "undetermined", icon: Icons.WorldIcon };\r
}\r
\r
interface OS {\r
  device: OSInfo;\r
  browser: OSInfo | undefined;\r
}\r
export async function getOSAuto(userAgent: string): Promise<OS> {\r
  const browser = getBrowser(userAgent);\r
  try {\r
    if ((navigator as any)?.userAgentData) {\r
      const uaData = await (navigator as any).userAgentData.getHighEntropyValues(["platform", "platformVersion", "model"]);\r
      const device = getDevice(uaData.model || uaData.platform);\r
\r
      if (uaData.platform === "Windows") {\r
        const majorVersion = parseInt(uaData.platformVersion.split(".")[0]);\r
        if (majorVersion >= 13) {\r
          return { device: { name: "Windows 11", icon: Icons.BrandWindows11Icon }, browser };\r
        }\r
        return { device: { name: "Windows 10", icon: Icons.BrandWindows810Icon }, browser };\r
      }\r
\r
      return { device, browser };\r
    }\r
  } catch (error) {\r
    console.error("Failed to detect high entropy userAgentData", error);\r
  }\r
  const device = getDevice(userAgent);\r
  return { device, browser };\r
}\r
\r
interface UseOsOptions {\r
  getValueInEffect?: boolean | string;\r
}\r
\r
export function useOS(opts: UseOsOptions = {}): OS {\r
  const { getValueInEffect = false } = opts;\r
  const nameInEffect = typeof getValueInEffect === "string" ? getValueInEffect : "undetermined";\r
  const defaultState = getValueInEffect ? { name: nameInEffect, icon: Icons.WorldIcon } : { name: "", icon: Icons.AISearchIcon };\r
  const [os, setOS] = useState<OS>({ device: defaultState, browser: defaultState });\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    const userAgent = window.navigator.userAgent;\r
    async function updateOS() {\r
      try {\r
        setOS(await getOSAuto(userAgent));\r
      } catch {\r
        setOS(os => os);\r
      }\r
    }\r
    updateOS();\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return os;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-os.ts"})]})}function m(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,n.jsx)(l,{...r})}):l(r)}function u(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(A);})();
;return Component;

`,(0,t.jsx)(r,{name:"use-pagination",code:`"use client";\r
import { useMemo } from "react";\r
import { useUncontrolled } from "@/hooks/use-uncontrolled";\r
\r
export function range(start: number, end: number) {\r
  const length = end - start + 1;\r
  return Array.from({ length }, (_, index) => index + start);\r
}\r
\r
export const DOTS = "dots";\r
\r
export interface PaginationParams {\r
  /** Page selected on initial render, defaults to 1 */\r
  initialPage?: number;\r
  /** Controlled active page number */\r
  page?: number;\r
  /** Total amount of pages */\r
  total: number;\r
  /** Siblings amount on left/right side of selected page, defaults to 1 */\r
  siblings?: number;\r
  /** Amount of elements visible on left/right edges, defaults to 1 */\r
  boundaries?: number;\r
  /** Callback fired after change of each page */\r
  onChange?: (page: number) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export function usePagination({ page, total, onChange, siblings = 1, boundaries = 1, initialPage = 1 }: PaginationParams) {\r
  const _total = Math.max(Math.trunc(total), 0);\r
  const [activePage, setActivePage] = useUncontrolled({\r
    value: page,\r
    onChange,\r
    defaultValue: initialPage,\r
    finalValue: initialPage\r
  });\r
\r
  const setPage = (pageNumber: number) => {\r
    if (pageNumber <= 0) {\r
      setActivePage(1);\r
    } else if (pageNumber > _total) {\r
      setActivePage(_total);\r
    } else {\r
      setActivePage(pageNumber);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const next = () => setPage(activePage + 1);\r
  const previous = () => setPage(activePage - 1);\r
  const first = () => setPage(1);\r
  const last = () => setPage(_total);\r
\r
  const paginationRange = useMemo((): (number | "dots")[] => {\r
    const totalPageNumbers = siblings * 2 + 3 + boundaries * 2;\r
    if (totalPageNumbers >= _total) {\r
      return range(1, _total);\r
    }\r
\r
    const leftSiblingIndex = Math.max(activePage - siblings, boundaries);\r
    const rightSiblingIndex = Math.min(activePage + siblings, _total - boundaries);\r
\r
    const shouldShowLeftDots = leftSiblingIndex > boundaries + 2;\r
    const shouldShowRightDots = rightSiblingIndex < _total - (boundaries + 1);\r
\r
    if (!shouldShowLeftDots && shouldShowRightDots) {\r
      const leftItemCount = siblings * 2 + boundaries + 2;\r
      return [...range(1, leftItemCount), DOTS, ...range(_total - (boundaries - 1), _total)];\r
    }\r
\r
    if (shouldShowLeftDots && !shouldShowRightDots) {\r
      const rightItemCount = boundaries + 1 + 2 * siblings;\r
      return [...range(1, boundaries), DOTS, ...range(_total - rightItemCount, _total)];\r
    }\r
\r
    return [...range(1, boundaries), DOTS, ...range(leftSiblingIndex, rightSiblingIndex), DOTS, ...range(_total - boundaries + 1, _total)];\r
  }, [_total, siblings, activePage]);\r
\r
  return {\r
    range: paginationRange,\r
    active: activePage,\r
    setPage,\r
    next,\r
    previous,\r
    first,\r
    last\r
  };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-pagination.ts"})]})}function c(e={}){let{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?(0,t.jsx)(n,{...e,children:(0,t.jsx)(u,{...e})}):u(e)}function S(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return P(w);})();

document.title: usePWAInstaller
document.description: Detects PWA install availability and handles prompting for installation.
document.summary: Enables installation logic for Progressive Web Apps.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `usePWAInstaller` works.

<UsePwaInstallerDemosUsage />

## API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/Guides/What_is_a_progressive_web_app)
- [`web.dev`](https://web.dev/explore/progressive-web-apps)
- [`learn`](https://web.dev/learn/pwa/)
- [`microsoft`](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/progressive-web-apps-chromium/)
- [`demos`](https://github.com/MicrosoftEdge/Demos)

Progressive web apps combine the best features of traditional websites and platform-specific apps.
The assumption is that you have already defined [manifest.json](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/Tutorials/js13kGames/Installable_PWAs) in the project, so you want to create a [trigger prompt](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/How_to/Trigger_install_prompt) for users to install the PWA from your application.

---

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.`}),`
`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-pwa-installer",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";\r
\r
export function usePWAInstaller() {\r
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState<any>(null);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const beforeInstallPromptHandler = (event: any) => {\r
      event.preventDefault();\r
      setPrompt(event);\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("beforeinstallprompt", beforeInstallPromptHandler);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("beforeinstallprompt", beforeInstallPromptHandler);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const installer = async () => {\r
    if (!prompt) return;\r
\r
    try {\r
      const result = await prompt.prompt();\r
      console.log(\`Install prompt was: \${result.outcome}\`);\r
    } catch (error) {\r
      console.error("Error while prompting install:", error);\r
    }\r
\r
    setPrompt(null);\r
  };\r
\r
  const disableInAppInstallPrompt = () => {\r
    setPrompt(null);\r
  };\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const appInstalledHandler = () => {\r
      disableInAppInstallPrompt();\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("appinstalled", appInstalledHandler);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("appinstalled", appInstalledHandler);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return { prompt, installer, disableInAppInstallPrompt };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-pwa-installer.ts"})]})}function h(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(d,{...n})}):d(n)}function p(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return k(y);})();

`,(0,e.jsx)(o,{name:"use-random-colors",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function getRandomColor() {\r
  const letters = "0123456789ABCDEF";\r
  let color = "#";\r
  for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\r
    color += letters[Math.floor(Math.random() * 16)];\r
  }\r
  return color;\r
}\r
\r
export function useRandomColors(initialColors: string[], intervalTime: number) {\r
  const [colors, setColors] = useState<string[]>(initialColors);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const interval = setInterval(() => {\r
      const newColors = initialColors.map(() => getRandomColor());\r
      setColors(newColors);\r
    }, intervalTime);\r
\r
    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r
  }, [initialColors, intervalTime]);\r
\r
  return colors;\r
}\r
\r
export function useStringToHEx(\r
  state: {\r
    defaultValue?: string;\r
    color?: string;\r
    setColor?: (e: string) => void;\r
  } = {}\r
) {\r
  const { defaultValue = "", color, setColor } = state;\r
\r
  const [inColor, setInColor] = useState(defaultValue);\r
  const clr = color !== undefined ? color : inColor;\r
  const setClr = setColor !== undefined ? setColor : setInColor;\r
\r
  const convertToHex = (color: string): string | null => {\r
    if (typeof document === "undefined") return null;\r
    const ctx = document.createElement("canvas").getContext("2d");\r
    if (!ctx) return null;\r
\r
    ctx.fillStyle = color;\r
    const computedColor = ctx.fillStyle;\r
    return /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/.test(computedColor) ? computedColor : null;\r
  };\r
\r
  const hexColor = convertToHex(clr) || "#000000";\r
\r
  return { hexColor, setColor: setClr, color: clr };\r
}\r
\r
/**\r
 *\r
 * @param color string\r
 * @param defaultColor "hsl(var(--color))"\r
 * @returns \`color\` | \`defaultColor\`\r
 */\r
export function getContrastColor(color?: string, defaultColor: string = "hsl(var(--color))"): string {\r
  if (!color) return defaultColor;\r
\r
  const isBrowser = typeof window !== "undefined" && typeof document !== "undefined";\r
  const clr = color ?? "#000000";\r
\r
  if (!isBrowser) {\r
    // console.warn("getContrastColor is running in a non-browser environment.");\r
    return defaultColor;\r
  }\r
\r
  const convertToHex = (color: string): string | null => {\r
    const ctx = document.createElement("canvas").getContext("2d");\r
    if (!ctx) return null;\r
\r
    ctx.fillStyle = color;\r
    const computedColor = ctx.fillStyle;\r
\r
    // Warna dalam format HEX\r
    if (/^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/.test(computedColor)) {\r
      return computedColor;\r
    }\r
\r
    // Konversi nama warna atau format RGB ke HEX\r
    const div = document.createElement("div");\r
    div.style.color = color;\r
    document.body.appendChild(div);\r
    const rgb = getComputedStyle(div).color;\r
    document.body.removeChild(div);\r
\r
    const match = rgb.match(/rgba?\\((\\d+),\\s*(\\d+),\\s*(\\d+)/);\r
    if (match) {\r
      const [r, g, b] = match.slice(1, 4).map(Number);\r
      return \`#\${((1 << 24) | (r << 16) | (g << 8) | b).toString(16).slice(1)}\`;\r
    }\r
\r
    return null;\r
  };\r
\r
  const hexColor = convertToHex(clr) || clr;\r
\r
  function parseColor(color: string): [number, number, number, number] {\r
    const tempDiv = document.createElement("div");\r
    tempDiv.style.color = color;\r
    document.body.appendChild(tempDiv);\r
    const computedColor = getComputedStyle(tempDiv).color;\r
    document.body.removeChild(tempDiv);\r
    const match = computedColor.match(/rgba?\\((\\d+),\\s*(\\d+),\\s*(\\d+)(?:,\\s*([\\d.]+))?\\)/);\r
\r
    if (match) {\r
      const r = parseInt(match[1], 10);\r
      const g = parseInt(match[2], 10);\r
      const b = parseInt(match[3], 10);\r
      const a = match[4] !== undefined ? parseFloat(match[4]) : 1;\r
      return [r, g, b, a];\r
    }\r
\r
    throw new Error(\`Invalid color: \${hexColor}\`);\r
  }\r
\r
  function getLuminance(r: number, g: number, b: number): number {\r
    const [R, G, B] = [r, g, b].map(value => {\r
      const normalized = value / 255;\r
      return normalized <= 0.03928 ? normalized / 12.92 : Math.pow((normalized + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4);\r
    });\r
    return 0.2126 * R + 0.7152 * G + 0.0722 * B;\r
  }\r

    const [r, g, b, a] = parseColor(hexColor);\r
\r
    if (a < 0.5) return defaultColor;\r
\r
    const luminance = getLuminance(r, g, b);\r
    return luminance > 0.5 ? "#000000" : "#FFFFFF";\r
  } catch (error) {\r
    console.error(error);\r
    return defaultColor;\r
  }\r

document.title: useReload
document.description: Provides logic to reload the page or refresh a component state programmatically.
document.summary: Triggers a full page or soft component reload.

body.raw:
## Usage

The `useReload` hook is useful when you need to programmatically trigger a reload of a page or specific content. Below is a basic example to see how this hook works in reloading components or entire windows.

<UseReloadDemosUsage />

## Hard Reload

In certain cases, you may need to perform a hard reload of the page to refresh all content or reset the state. This section shows how to use useReload for performing a hard reload on the `window`.

<UseReloadDemosReloadWindow />

### API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Location/reload)

useReload utilizes the `location.reload()` method to initialize the current URL's reload location, such as creating a Refresh button whose style and layout you create yourself.

---

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useReload() {\r
  const [loading, onLoading] = useState(false);\r
  const [key, setKey] = useState(0);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const handleBeforeUnload = () => onLoading(true);\r
    const handleLoad = () => onLoading(false);\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("beforeunload", handleBeforeUnload);\r
    window.addEventListener("load", handleLoad);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("beforeunload", handleBeforeUnload);\r
      window.removeEventListener("load", handleLoad);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const onReload = useCallback(() => {\r
    setKey(prev => prev + 1);\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const onReloadWindow = useCallback(<T = Element, E = MouseEvent>(e?: React.MouseEvent<T, E>) => {\r
    window.location.reload();\r
    e?.preventDefault();\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return { loading, onLoading, key, onReload, onReloadWindow };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-reload.ts"})]})}function u(r={}){let{wrapper:e}=r.components||{};return e?(0,o.jsx)(e,{...r,children:(0,o.jsx)(h,{...r})}):h(r)}function s(r,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return y(L);})();

import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
\r
type ObserverRect = Omit<DOMRectReadOnly, "toJSON">;\r
\r
const defaultState: ObserverRect = {\r
  x: 0,\r

  width: 0,\r
  height: 0,\r
  top: 0,\r
  left: 0,\r
  bottom: 0,\r

};\r

export function useResizeObserver<T extends HTMLElement = any>() {\r

        ? new ResizeObserver((entries: any) => {\r
            const entry = entries[0];\r

                if (ref.current) {\r
                  setRect(entry.contentRect);\r
                }\r
              });\r
            }\r
          })\r
        : null,\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r

    if (ref.current) {\r
      observer?.observe(ref.current);\r
    }\r

        cancelAnimationFrame(frameID.current);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, observer]);\r

  return [ref, rect] as const;\r
}\r

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
import { useReducedMotion } from "@/hooks/use-reduced-motion";\r
\r
interface ScrollIntoViewAnimation {\r
  alignment?: "start" | "end" | "center";\r
}\r
interface ScrollIntoViewParams {\r
  onScrollFinish?: () => void;\r
  duration?: number;\r
  axis?: "x" | "y";\r
  easing?: (t: number) => number;\r
  offset?: number;\r
  cancelable?: boolean;\r
  isList?: boolean;\r
}\r
interface ScrollIntoViewReturnType<Target extends HTMLElement, Parent extends HTMLElement | null = null> {\r
  scrollableRef: React.RefObject<Parent>;\r
  targetRef: React.RefObject<Target>;\r
  scrollIntoView: (params?: ScrollIntoViewAnimation) => void;\r
  cancel: () => void;\r
}\r
\r
export const easeInOutQuad = (t: number) => (t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t);\r
\r
export const getRelativePosition = ({ axis, target, parent, alignment, offset, isList }: any): number => {\r
  if (!target || (!parent && typeof document === "undefined")) {\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
  const isCustomParent = !!parent;\r
  const parentElement = parent || document.body;\r
  const parentPosition = parentElement.getBoundingClientRect();\r
  const targetPosition = target.getBoundingClientRect();\r
\r
  const getDiff = (property: "top" | "left"): number => targetPosition[property] - parentPosition[property];\r
\r
  if (axis === "y") {\r
    const diff = getDiff("top");\r
\r
    if (diff === 0) return 0;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "start") {\r
      const distance = diff - offset;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance <= targetPosition.height * (isList ? 0 : 1) || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    const parentHeight = isCustomParent ? parentPosition.height : window.innerHeight;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "end") {\r
      const distance = diff + offset - parentHeight + targetPosition.height;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance >= -targetPosition.height * (isList ? 0 : 1) || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (alignment === "center") {\r
      return diff - parentHeight / 2 + targetPosition.height / 2;\r
    }\r
\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (axis === "x") {\r
    const diff = getDiff("left");\r
\r
    if (diff === 0) return 0;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "start") {\r
      const distance = diff - offset;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance <= targetPosition.width || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    const parentWidth = isCustomParent ? parentPosition.width : window.innerWidth;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "end") {\r
      const distance = diff + offset - parentWidth + targetPosition.width;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance >= -targetPosition.width || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (alignment === "center") {\r
      return diff - parentWidth / 2 + targetPosition.width / 2;\r
    }\r
\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  return 0;\r
};\r

  if (!parent && typeof document === "undefined") {\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  const method = axis === "y" ? "scrollTop" : "scrollLeft";\r
\r
  if (parent) {\r
    return parent[method];\r
  }\r
\r
  const { body, documentElement } = document;\r
\r
  // while one of it has a value the second is equal 0\r
  return body[method] + documentElement[method];\r
};\r
\r
export const setScrollParam = ({ axis, parent, distance }: any) => {\r
  if (!parent && typeof document === "undefined") {\r
    return;\r
  }\r
\r
  const method = axis === "y" ? "scrollTop" : "scrollLeft";\r
\r
  if (parent) {\r
    parent[method] = distance;\r
  } else {\r
    const { body, documentElement } = document;\r
    body[method] = distance;\r
    documentElement[method] = distance;\r
  }\r
};\r
\r
export function useScrollIntoView<Target extends HTMLElement, Parent extends HTMLElement | null = null>({ duration = 1250, axis = "y", onScrollFinish, easing = easeInOutQuad, offset = 0, cancelable = true, isList = false }: ScrollIntoViewParams = {}) {\r
  const frameID = useRef(0);\r
  const startTime = useRef(0);\r
  const shouldStop = useRef(false);\r
\r
  const scrollableRef = useRef<Parent>(null);\r
  const targetRef = useRef<Target>(null);\r
\r
  const reducedMotion = useReducedMotion();\r
\r
  const cancel = (): void => {\r
    if (frameID.current) {\r
      cancelAnimationFrame(frameID.current);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const scrollIntoView = useCallback(\r
    ({ alignment = "start" }: ScrollIntoViewAnimation = {}) => {\r
      shouldStop.current = false;\r
\r
      if (frameID.current) {\r
        cancel();\r
      }\r
\r
      const start = getScrollStart({ parent: scrollableRef.current, axis }) ?? 0;\r
\r
      const change =\r
        getRelativePosition({\r
          parent: scrollableRef.current,\r
          target: targetRef.current,\r
          axis,\r
          alignment,\r
          offset,\r
          isList\r
        }) - (scrollableRef.current ? 0 : start);\r
\r
      function animateScroll() {\r
        if (startTime.current === 0) {\r
          startTime.current = performance.now();\r
        }\r
\r
        const now = performance.now();\r
        const elapsed = now - startTime.current;\r
\r
        // easing timing progress\r
        const t = reducedMotion || duration === 0 ? 1 : elapsed / duration;\r
\r
        const distance = start + change * easing(t);\r

        setScrollParam({\r
          parent: scrollableRef.current,\r
          axis,\r
          distance\r
        });\r

        if (!shouldStop.current && t < 1) {\r
          frameID.current = requestAnimationFrame(animateScroll);\r

          if (typeof onScrollFinish === "function") {\r
            onScrollFinish();\r
          }\r
          startTime.current = 0;\r
          frameID.current = 0;\r
          cancel();\r
        }\r
      }\r
      animateScroll();\r
    },\r
    [axis, duration, easing, isList, offset, onScrollFinish, reducedMotion]\r
  );\r
\r
  const handleStop = () => {\r
    if (cancelable) {\r
      shouldStop.current = true;\r
    }\r
  };\r

  /**\r
   * detection of one of these events stops scroll animation\r
   * wheel - mouse wheel / touch pad\r
   * touchmove - any touchable device\r
   */\r

    passive: true\r
  });\r

  useEffect(() => cancel, []);\r

    scrollableRef,\r
    targetRef,\r
    scrollIntoView,\r
    cancel\r
  } as ScrollIntoViewReturnType<Target, Parent>;\r

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"use-state-history",code:`"use client";\r
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export interface UseStateHistoryHandlers<T> {\r
  set: (value: T) => void;\r
  back: (steps?: number) => void;\r
  forward: (steps?: number) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export interface StateHistory<T> {\r
  history: T[];\r
  current: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function useStateHistory<T>(initialValue: T): [T, UseStateHistoryHandlers<T>, StateHistory<T>] {\r
  const [state, setState] = useState<StateHistory<T>>({\r
    history: [initialValue],\r
    current: 0\r
  });\r
\r
  const set = useCallback(\r
    (val: T) =>\r
      setState(currentState => {\r
        const nextState = [...currentState.history.slice(0, currentState.current + 1), val];\r
        return {\r
          history: nextState,\r
          current: nextState.length - 1\r
        };\r
      }),\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  const back = useCallback(\r
    (steps = 1) =>\r
      setState(currentState => ({\r
        history: currentState.history,\r
        current: Math.max(0, currentState.current - steps)\r
      })),\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  const forward = useCallback(\r
    (steps = 1) =>\r
      setState(currentState => ({\r
        history: currentState.history,\r
        current: Math.min(currentState.history.length - 1, currentState.current + steps)\r
      })),\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  const handlers = useMemo(() => ({ set, forward, back }), []);\r
\r
  return [state.history[state.current], handlers, state];\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-state-history.ts"})]})}function d(e={}){let{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?(0,r.jsx)(t,{...e,children:(0,r.jsx)(l,{...e})}):l(e)}function w(e,t){throw new Error("Expected "+(t?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return g(v);})();

  }, [clear, start]);\r

import React from "react";\r
\r
interface UseTouchProps {\r
  touch?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export function useTouch<T extends HTMLElement>(_touch: UseTouchProps) {\r
  const { touch = true, defaultOpen = false, onOpenChange, open: openChange } = _touch;\r
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);\r
\r
  const triggerRef = React.useRef<T>(null);\r
  const open = openChange !== undefined ? openChange : isOpen;\r
  const setOpen = onOpenChange !== undefined ? onOpenChange : setIsOpen;\r
\r
  const [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice] = React.useState(false);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    const el = triggerRef.current;\r
    const onMouseEnter = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(true);\r
    };\r
    const onMouseLeave = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(false);\r
    };\r
    const onMouseMove = () => {\r
      if (isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(false);\r
    };\r
    const onTouchStart = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
      setOpen(true);\r
    };\r
    const onTouchEnd = () => {\r
      setOpen(false);\r
    };\r
\r
    const windowTouchStart = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
    };\r
\r
    if (el) {\r
      // if touch active\r
      if (touch) {\r
        el.addEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
        el.addEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
      }\r
\r
      window.addEventListener("touchstart", windowTouchStart);\r
      window.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
      el.addEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
      el.addEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
      el.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        // if touch active\r
        if (touch) {\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
\r
        window.removeEventListener("touchstart", windowTouchStart);\r
        window.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setOpen, triggerRef, touch]);\r
\r
  return { touch, open, triggerRef };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-touch.ts"})]})}function h(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,t.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,t.jsx)(l,{...n})}):l(n)}function L(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return E(x);})();

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-trigger",code:`"use client";\r
import { DependencyList, useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import { useMeasureScrollbar } from "@/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar";\r
\r
interface UseTrigger {\r
  popstate?: boolean;\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  setOpen?: (v: boolean) => void;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  delay?: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function useTrigger<T extends HTMLElement | null>(handle: UseTrigger = {}) {\r
  const { modal, popstate = false, open: exOpen, setOpen: exSetOpen, defaultOpen = false, delay = 115 } = handle;\r
  const [inOpen, inSetOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);\r
  const open = exOpen !== undefined ? exOpen : inOpen;\r
  const setOpen = exSetOpen !== undefined ? exSetOpen : inSetOpen;\r
  const [initialOpen, setInitialOpen] = useState(false);\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const render = useRender(open, { delay, modal });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (open !== defaultOpen) {\r
      setInitialOpen(true);\r
    }\r
  }, [open, defaultOpen]);\r
\r
  const toggle = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (popstate) {\r
      if (!open) {\r
        window.history.pushState({ open: true }, "");\r
        setOpen(true);\r
      } else {\r
        window.history.back();\r
        setOpen(false);\r
      }\r
    } else {\r
      setOpen(!open);\r
    }\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen]);\r
\r
  usePopState(popstate, { open, setOpen });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const current = ref.current;\r
\r
    const attachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.addEventListener("click", toggle);\r
      }\r
    };\r
    const detachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.removeEventListener("click", toggle);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    attachListeners(current);\r
    return () => {\r
      detachListeners(current);\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, toggle]);\r
\r
  return { ref, open, setOpen, initialOpen, render, toggle };\r
}\r
\r
export function useRender(open: boolean, { delay = 150, modal = false } = {}, depend?: DependencyList) {\r
  const [render, setRender] = useState(open);\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    let timeoutId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r
    if (open) {\r
      setRender(true);\r
    } else {\r
      timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {\r
        setRender(false);\r
      }, delay);\r
    }\r
    return () => {\r
      if (timeoutId) {\r
        clearTimeout(timeoutId);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [open, delay, depend]);\r
\r
  useMeasureScrollbar(!open ? render : open, { modal });\r
\r
  return render;\r
}\r
\r
function usePopState(popstate?: boolean, { open, setOpen }: { open?: boolean; setOpen?: (v: boolean) => void } = {}) {\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const historyPopState = () => {\r
      if (open && setOpen) {\r
        setOpen(false);\r
      }\r
    };\r
    if (popstate) {\r
      window.addEventListener("popstate", historyPopState);\r
    }\r
    return () => {\r
      if (popstate) {\r
        window.removeEventListener("popstate", historyPopState);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen]);\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-trigger.ts"})]})}function u(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(c,{...n})}):c(n)}function d(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(y);})();

export function useValidatedState<T>(initialValue: T, validation: (value: T) => boolean, initialValidationState?: boolean) {\r

import { useCallback, useState, useEffect } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
\r
const eventListerOptions = {\r
  passive: true\r
};\r
\r
export function useViewportSize() {\r
  const [windowSize, setWindowSize] = useState({\r
    width: 0,\r
    height: 0\r
  });\r
\r
  const setSize = useCallback(() => {\r
    setWindowSize({\r
      width: window.innerWidth || 0,\r
      height: window.innerHeight || 0\r
    });\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("resize", setSize, eventListerOptions);\r
  useWindowEvent("orientationchange", setSize, eventListerOptions);\r
  useEffect(setSize, [setSize]);\r
\r
  return windowSize;\r

document.title: useWindowScroll
document.description: Tracks the scroll position of the window and updates in real-time.
document.summary: Monitors and provides current window scroll values.

body.raw:
## Usage

The `useWindowScroll` hook allows you to track the scroll position of the window. This can be useful for features like infinite scrolling, sticky elements, or scroll-based animations. Here’s an example to demonstrate how to use the `useWindowScroll` hook to monitor the scroll position of the window.

`,(0,n.jsx)(r,{name:"use-window-scroll",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
\r
interface ScrollPosition {\r
  x: number;\r
  y: number;\r
}\r
\r
function getScrollPosition(): ScrollPosition {\r
  return typeof window !== "undefined" ? { x: window.pageXOffset, y: window.pageYOffset } : { x: 0, y: 0 };\r
}\r
\r
function scrollTo({ x, y }: Partial<ScrollPosition>) {\r
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {\r
    const scrollOptions: ScrollToOptions = { behavior: "smooth" };\r
\r
    if (typeof x === "number") {\r
      scrollOptions.left = x;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (typeof y === "number") {\r
      scrollOptions.top = y;\r
    }\r
\r
    window.scrollTo(scrollOptions);\r
  }\r
}\r
\r
function checkIfBottom(): boolean {\r
  const windowHeight = window.innerHeight;\r
  const documentHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight;\r
  const scrollTop = window.scrollY;\r
  const tolerance = 5; // small tolerance\r
\r
  return scrollTop + windowHeight + tolerance >= documentHeight;\r
}\r
\r
export function useWindowScroll() {\r
  const [bottom, setBottom] = useState(false);\r
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);\r
  const [position, setPosition] = useState<ScrollPosition>({ x: 0, y: 0 });\r
  const [isScroll, setIsScroll] = useState(false);\r
\r
  let scrollTimeout: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r
\r
  const handleScroll = () => {\r
    const pos = getScrollPosition();\r
    setPosition(pos);\r
    setBottom(checkIfBottom());\r
    setIsScroll(true);\r
\r
    if (scrollTimeout) {\r
      clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);\r
    }\r
\r
    scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {\r
      setIsScroll(false);\r
    }, 1500);\r
  };\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("scroll", handleScroll);\r
  useWindowEvent("resize", handleScroll);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    handleScroll();\r
    setMounted(true);\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const scrollToBottom = () => {\r
    window.scrollTo({\r
      top: document.documentElement.scrollHeight,\r
      behavior: "smooth"\r
    });\r
  };\r
\r
  const scrollToTop = () => {\r
    window.scrollTo({\r
      top: 0,\r
      behavior: "smooth"\r
    });\r
  };\r
\r
  const scrollWindow = bottom ? scrollToTop : scrollToBottom;\r
\r
  return { position, scrollTo, bottom, mounted, isScroll, scrollWindow };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-window-scroll.ts"})]})}function h(e={}){let{wrapper:o}=e.components||{};return o?(0,n.jsx)(o,{...e,children:(0,n.jsx)(d,{...e})}):d(e)}function u(e,o){throw new Error("Expected "+(o?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(T);})();
